name: Bourbon Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Blanch the pecans for one minute in boiling water, then drain.
3. In a bowl, combine the reduced bourbon (3 tablespoons), sugar, Angostura bitters, Worcestershire sauce, corn oil, Cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper.
4. Toss the hot pecans with the bourbon mixture until evenly coated.
5. Let stand for 10 minutes.
6. Spread on a rimmed sheet tray.
7. Bake for 30-50 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.
8. When the nuts are crisp and lightly browned and the liquid has evaporated, remove from the oven and toss with ground cumin.
9. Turn out onto a sheet pan to cool in a single layer.
10. Store in an airtight container.
